title: aneilema indehiscens subsp. indehiscens
intro: Aneilema indehiscens subsp. indehiscens is a plant species in the family Commelinaceae, commonly known as the grassy Aneilema. This plant is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Aneilema indehiscens subsp. indehiscens include its potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve making a decoction or infusion from its leaves and roots, which can be used to treat various ailments.
